scope: Post-training evaluation hook plan and implementation. No training, local training, mini training, smoke tests, py_compile, help checks, Kaggle commands, evaluation, or external evaluation was run during implementation.

background.stage43b2: The standalone evaluator is scaffold-only and does not yet implement real checkpoint inference.
background.runtime_checkpoint_status: Prior checkpoint files are unavailable after runtime reset.
background.stage43c0_reason: Add a post-training hook inside the existing training runner so external evaluation can run after normal clean-dev best-state restoration.

leakage_policy: External files are never used for training, calibration, checkpoint selection, threshold selection, loss design, model selection, or composer behavior changes.
cross_domain_policy: Any failure on Climate-FEVER should be interpreted as a cross-domain limitation, not as a training signal.
guardrails: Do not use Stage43-B1 data in training.
Do not use Stage43-B1 data in checkpoint selection.
Do not use Stage43-B1 data in threshold selection.
Do not use Stage43-B1 data for calibration.
Do not modify model/composer behavior based on external results.
Do not silently run external eval by default.
Do not report heuristic-only results as PASS.
Do not alter Stage39-C composer behavior.
Do not treat Stage34/35 synthetic probes as naturalistic external validation.
recommendation: Use Stage43-C0 only as an explicit post-training eval-only hook after normal best-state restoration. Report VitaminC as in-family external fact-verification and Climate-FEVER as cross-domain fact-verification.
